name: Rosamarina-Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water, rosamarina, and salt to boiling in a 1-quart saucepan.
2. Reduce heat. Simmer for 5 to 8 minutes or until almost tender.
3. Rinse the mixture in cold water and drain.
4. Beat whipping cream and sugar in a chilled medium bowl until stiff.
5. Stir in rosamarina and remaining ingredients.
6. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
Serving Size: 1/2 cup (6 servings total)
Calories per Serving: 230
